brief.objective: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
keyMessages: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The Pathways products page describes CARE Coaching as collaborative educator support with reflective and data-driven practices.
visualDirection: coach and school leader reviewing notes
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
Consulting, coaching, and continuous learning for your team
subheadOptions: CARE Coaching provides tailored professional development, workshops, program evaluations, and personalized coaching that help educators reflect on current practice.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
copy.body: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders. For district EL leaders, this draft focuses on customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support.
bullets: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.

fittedCopy.headline: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
fittedCopy.deck: Support educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: Support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: large campaign headline, concise deck, exactly two proof points, and one compact lower CTA
designRecipe.artDirection: full-bleed CARE Coaching campaign flyer with a trusted, human, evidence-informed education feel; right-side visual story suggests district EL leadership, multilingual learner support, family-school partnership, and coaching/continuous learning without depicting readable materials
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: reserve a clean left editorial field through soft light, restrained texture, and subject placement; imply the lower proof/CTA rhythm with tonal grounding, never boxes or fake UI
designRecipe.appComposition: app owns official logo at top-left plus all real headline, deck, proof points, CTA, and export; generated art shapes the right field and full-bleed atmosphere while supporting the left-led editorial stack
promptDirectives: Design the whole 4:5 flyer concept, not a decorative background.
Integrate the right-side visual story with the left message zone through light, crop, and motion.
Show authentic coaching and multilingual education leadership cues; avoid readable papers or signage.
No fake text, fake logos, placeholder boxes, contact strips, or blank cards.

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CARE Coaching prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.

layoutQa.question: Would I send this layout to the WCEPS team without apology?

copyQualityQa.question: Would I send this copy to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: Generated copy repeats the same source idea across body, subhead, or bullets before copy-fit.

failureModes.message: Generated copy repeats the same source idea across body, subhead, or bullets before copy-fit.

visualQa.question: Would I send this visual system to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CARE Coaching visual prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.

failureModes.message: CARE Coaching visual prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.

renderQa.question: Would I send this rendered artifact to the WCEPS team without apology?

modelQa.question: Would a senior WCEPS reviewer send this artifact without apology?
warnings: The fitted proof point “Provide source-grounded CARE Coaching support” is awkward, process-oriented, and not a persuasive audience benefit.
The copy relies on broad support language and repeats CARE Coaching terminology without enough concrete value for district EL leaders.
The CTA invites a conversation but provides no mechanism, URL, contact cue, or next-step detail for flyer export.
The art plate is polished and relevant, but maps, sticky notes, and books can read as generic multilingual/global education imagery rather than CARE-specific coaching.

safeZones: Create a portrait art field with enough texture to support editorial layout.
Keep important visual energy away from trim and crop edges.
Avoid document panels, empty modules, fake cards, or CTA-like shapes.

Support educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
Support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching

Deterministic grid, typography, headline, audience, and CTA.
Exact support copy and proof hierarchy.
Final export wrapper, source evidence, and review state.
imageGenOwnedElements: Atmosphere, photography or illustration treatment, color, texture, and crop rhythm.
No document layout, fake cards, panels, contact bars, charts, or text.

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Create a 1024x1536 portrait full-page marketing campaign art plate for CARE Coaching, designed as an app-composed flyer concept with no rendered text. Full-bleed polished education-sector editorial composition, warm practical district-facing tone. Use an editorial split composition: reserve a clean, type-safe left editorial field with soft light, restrained paper-like texture, gentle gradient and subtle depth for future app typography and official logo; no boxes, no panels, no placeholder modules. The right side carries the visual story: authentic collaborative coaching conversation between adult educators/school leaders in a bright professional learning setting, reviewing coaching notes and language-support planning materials; imply multilingual learner support through abstract color-coded sticky notes, non-readable paper shapes, simple world-language planning artifacts with all writing blurred/abstract and illegible. Show professional learning facilitation and reflective planning, district leadership context, customized support, continuous learning, and the Three Cs concept only through three subtle non-logo visual rhythms or grouped objects (for example three warm accent highlights or three stacked abstract material layers), without any words or icons. Premium NY media/ad-agency quality, evidence-informed human education feel, layered depth, intentional crop, rich visual density on right, balanced overall hierarchy. Color palette inspired by teal #0081A4, aqua #3EB3BD, green #5EA974, soft yellow #F7D470, warm neutrals. Keep important visual energy away from trim edges. Avoid close-up faces and detailed hands; use natural editorial mid-distance, candid, unposed. Absolutely no readable text, letters, numbers, logos, wordmarks, labels, fake paragraphs, charts, UI, cards, contact bars, seals, badges, arrows, chevrons, mountain marks, fake logos, book titles, publisher brands, or CTA-like elements. Do not render CARE Coaching logo or any logo-like mark. No document layout scaffolding. The generated image should be a complete text-free full-bleed campaign art plate that shapes the right-side visual story and leaves the left side ready for app-owned headline, deck, exactly two proof points, and one compact lower CTA.

request.goal: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
request.topic: customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support
request.notes: Highlight the Three Cs without drifting into sibling needs-assessment copy.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The WCEPS CARE Coaching program supports educators by focusing on the Three Cs: Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching Three Cs

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Our professional learning offerings are designed to help educators reflect on their current practices and implement research-based actions that lead to meaningful change.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching support model

sourceEvidence.excerpt: CARE Coaching is described through collaborative educator support, reflective and data-driven practices, and student-centered growth.
sourceEvidence.label: Products page CARE overview
